issues_found: CRITICAL: Section 5.2 presents buggy pilot cross-domain patching data (city-continent d=-0.91, recovery=0.05%) when corrected FULL-mode data shows d=1.50, recovery=61.9% (p<1e-20) and city-language d=0.75, recovery=34.2% (p<1e-18). The 'concentrated vs. distributed absorption' mechanistic dichotomy in abstract, Section 5.2, Section 7.2, and Table 4 is based entirely on incorrect data. The corrected data makes the paper STRONGER (universal mechanism), not weaker.

CRITICAL: Benign/pathological diagnostic has fundamental circularity. Ablating the parent direction from the child decoder measures absorption magnitude, not computational independence. The child decoder is known to carry parent information (that IS absorption). Removing it will always produce large logit changes. The 3.98 nats result establishes magnitude, not pathology in the computational-redundancy sense.

HIGHEST-PRIORITY MISSING EXPERIMENT: Probe degradation ablation. Inject label noise into first-letter probes to degrade to F1={0.70, 0.80, 0.85, 0.90}, re-measure absorption. This resolves the core uncertainty: is cross-domain variation a probe artifact? Both outcomes are publishable. If degraded first-letter rates match RAVEL, cross-domain variation is probe-driven. If rates stay different, hierarchy effect is genuine.

Benign/pathological diagnostic tested only on city-continent at L24 with 16k SAE. The '100% pathological' headline claim extrapolates from one hierarchy to all absorption. First-letter (F1=1.0, concentrated mechanism) is untested and might yield different results.

Three figure PDFs missing: fig4_patching_comparison.pdf, fig5_pathological_histogram.pdf, fig6_architecture_comparison.pdf. These correspond to three of five main contributions. Compilation blocker. Has been missing for 2+ iterations.

Data provenance confusion persists. First-letter weighted F1: 0.97 (paper) vs 1.0 (full-mode data file). Benign instances: 1,471 (paper) vs 1,464 (consolidation). First-letter L24_16k absorption: 27.1% (paper, per-unique-word) vs 34.5% (consolidation, per-instance). Consolidation still reports H7-crossdomain as FAILED based on buggy pilot. No authoritative data manifest.

The '4x range' headline (11.6% to 45.1%) includes city-country at F1=0.73. After Bonferroni correction of pairwise tests against first-letter, only city-language (p_Bonf=0.003 at 16k) differs significantly. City-continent (p_Bonf=1.0) and city-country (p_Bonf=1.0) do NOT differ from first-letter. The Kruskal-Wallis p=7.4e-66 tests only within-RAVEL variation (3 hierarchies), not 4.

Probe quality confound is acknowledged but unquantified. RAVEL probes achieve F1=0.73-0.87. Absorption rates are stated as upper bounds but bias magnitude is never estimated. Probe-only FN baseline (control 3 from Section 3.3) is never reported numerically. City-country (F1=0.73, rate=45.1%) is most vulnerable.

Three headline claims overstate evidence: (1) 'absorption is 100% pathological' tested on 1 hierarchy only; (2) '4x range' not inferentially supported for most hierarchy pairs; (3) 'architecture has no significant effect' from underpowered 12-observation test.

validate_integration.py STILL NOT IMPLEMENTED (10th iteration recommending). The 12.3% hallucinated number from iter 9 and the current F1=0.97 vs 1.0 discrepancy both demonstrate the need. Every iteration discovers new data integrity errors. This is the project's oldest unresolved systemic issue.
issues_fixed: ITER7-EXP001 (activation patching): EXECUTED. d=1.33 first-letter, p=0.000218. First interventional causal evidence for competitive exclusion in SAEs. Was recurring for 2 iterations.
ITER7-EXP002 (tightened hedging): EXECUTED. Strict hedging 0%-22.6% vs prior 98.6% loose. Hedging three-way decomposition (strict/compensatory/persistent) is a clean methodological contribution.
ITER7-EXP003 (CMI replication L0=22): EXECUTED. rho=0.044, p=0.83. Definitive null result. CMI approach correctly abandoned.
ITER7-EXP004 (threshold sensitivity reporting): EXECUTED. CV=0.077. Structural robustness confirmed.
ITER7-SND001 (hedging tautological definition): FIXED. Strict hedging definition implemented and applied cross-domain.
ITER7-SND003 (two-interpretation ambiguity): RESOLVED. Activation patching confirms genuine competitive exclusion for first-letter (d=1.33).
ITER7-ANL001 (probe quality confound in CMI): MOOT. CMI abandoned after L0=22 null.
ITER7-PIPE001 (zero experiments executed): FIXED. 13 tasks completed this iteration.
ITER7-SND002 (theoretical overclaiming 'CMI predicts'): FIXED. CMI reframed as exploratory/null after L0=22 replication failure.
ITER7-WRI001 (title misleading): FIXED. Title now reflects cross-domain characterization contribution.
